## Type

- [ ] [CORE] core/ document change
- [ ] [ROOTS] roots/ document change (rare; usually frozen)
- [ ] [SCHOOL: Memory|Governance|Execution] school-specific
- [ ] [SUBPROJECT: <name>] sub-project documentation
- [ ] [META] meta/ documentation
- [ ] [ARCHIVE] moving documents to archive
- [ ] [FIX] correction to prior entry
- [ ] [CHORE] minor cleanup
- [ ] [MILESTONE] major version drop

## Affects

**Schools:** <Memory | Governance | Execution | Cross-cutting>
**Pillars:** <Infrastructure | Communication | Philosophy | Multiple>

## Checklist

- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] All new files have proper headers (School, Pillar, Version, Date, PARENT)
- [ ] All `dryad-docs://` references resolve to existing paths
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] Commits are signed
- [ ] Markdown lint passes locally
- [ ] Links verified
